implementation.description: OT/IT workload classification, network segmentation design, air-gap architecture for SCADA systems, governance framework definition
MCCP deployment, private cloud provisioning, cross-cloud automation pipelines, BSI-certified security controls
Progressive workload migration to hybrid platform, OT isolation testing, compliance audit preparation

proof_of_value.scope: Architecture blueprint and security assessment for one OT/IT boundary, 3-week delivery

small.scope: Single-site hybrid deployment, up to 30 workloads, 10-week delivery

medium.scope: Multi-site deployment with MCCP, up to 100 workloads, 14-week delivery

large.scope: Enterprise-wide hybrid platform with full OT integration, 20-week delivery
